privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.tagline: We believe in transparency. Here's exactly what we do with your data.
privacyPolicy.shortVersionText: We collect only what's necessary to provide ClaraVerse services. Your data is encrypted, you can export it anytime, and you can delete everything with one click. We don't sell your data. Ever.
privacyPolicy.accountInfoDesc: User ID and email address provided by your authentication provider (Supabase). This is the minimum needed to identify your account.
privacyPolicy.uploadedFilesDesc: Images, PDFs, CSV, Excel, JSON, and other files you upload for AI processing
privacyPolicy.agentsWorkflowsDesc: Custom AI agents and workflows you build
privacyPolicy.credentialsDesc: Encrypted API keys for external providers you configure
privacyPolicy.usageDataDesc: Timestamps, model selections, and feature usage patterns. This helps us improve the service and debug issues.
privacyPolicy.howUse.operate: To provide and operate ClaraVerse services
privacyPolicy.howUse.process: To process your requests through AI model providers
privacyPolicy.howUse.sync: To sync your data across devices (when you enable cloud sync)
privacyPolicy.howUse.auth: To authenticate and secure your account
privacyPolicy.howUse.improve: To improve the service based on usage patterns
privacyPolicy.legalBasisText: Legitimate interest in providing the service (GDPR Article 6(1)(f))
privacyPolicy.yourRightsDesc: You have full control over your data:
privacyPolicy.accessDataDesc: Download all your personal data at any time from Settings → Account.
privacyPolicy.deleteDataDesc: Delete your account and all associated data permanently.
privacyPolicy.portabilityDesc: Export your data in machine-readable JSON format.
privacyPolicy.thirdParty.supabaseShared: Data shared: User ID, email, auth tokens
privacyPolicy.thirdParty.aiProvidersDesc: Processing chat messages and generating responses
privacyPolicy.thirdParty.aiProvidersShar: Data shared: Messages and file content you send. Provider varies based on your selection (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, etc.) (Note: TEE Provider never store data and they cannot access it as well)
privacyPolicy.security.encryption: AES-256-GCM encryption for sensitive data at rest
privacyPolicy.security.bcrypt: Bcrypt hashing for API key storage
privacyPolicy.security.jwt: JWT-based authentication with secure token handling
privacyPolicy.security.https: HTTPS encryption for all data in transit
privacyPolicy.security.expiration: Automatic data expiration for temporary files
privacyPolicy.cookiesDesc: We use minimal cookies for authentication purposes only. No tracking cookies, no third-party analytics, no advertising cookies.
privacyPolicy.changesDesc: We'll notify you of significant changes via email or in-app notification. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance.
privacyPolicy.contactDesc: Questions about this policy or want to exercise your rights?
privacyPolicy.footer: This policy is written in plain language because we believe privacy policies shouldn't require a law degree to understand.
